attendees: Joy Brenda Masinde (Chair), Joseph Siror (CEO), CFO, CTO, 5 Non-Executive Directors, Company Secretary
agenda: 1. H1 FY2025 Financial Results; 2. Smart Metering Rollout Progress; 3. System Loss Reduction Update; 4. IPP Contract Review; 5. EPRA Tariff Application
resolutions: H1 results noted. Smart metering rollout on track — 120,000 meters installed. System loss reduction to 21.5% acknowledged. EPRA tariff application approved for submission.

attendees: Michael Joseph (Chair), Allan Kilavuka (CEO), CFO, CCO, 6 Non-Executive Directors, Company Secretary
agenda: 1. FY2024 Annual Results; 2. Debt Restructuring Update; 3. Fleet Plan 2025-2028; 4. Route Network Review; 5. Strategic Partnership Options
resolutions: FY2024 results noted. Debt restructuring negotiations with KQ Lenders Group progressing. Fleet plan approved. Route network optimisation endorsed. Strategic partnership options to be presented to shareholder.

attendees: Roy Mwanthi (Chair), William Ruto (CEO), CFO, COO, 5 Non-Executive Directors, Company Secretary
agenda: 1. FY2024 Annual Results; 2. Berth 22 and 23 Construction Progress; 3. Container Throughput Performance; 4. SGR Integration Update; 5. Lamu Port Development
resolutions: FY2024 record throughput results approved. Berth construction at 65% — on schedule. SGR integration improvement plan endorsed. Lamu Port Phase 2 feasibility study approved.

attendees: Anthony Mwaura (Chair), Humphrey Wattanga (Commissioner General), Deputy Commissioners, 4 Board Members, Board Secretary
agenda: 1. FY2024 Revenue Performance; 2. Medium Term Revenue Strategy Progress; 3. iTax Phase 3 Procurement; 4. Informal Sector Taxation Pilot; 5. Transfer Pricing Audit Results
resolutions: FY2024 revenue of KES 2.52 trillion celebrated. iTax Phase 3 procurement approved. Informal sector pilot expansion to 5 more counties approved. Transfer pricing audit results noted.

attendees: Antony Mwaniki Munyiri (Chair), David Koross (CEO), CFO, CIO, 6 Board Members, Board Secretary
agenda: 1. FY2024 Fund Performance; 2. NSSF Act 2023 Implementation Update; 3. Investment Portfolio Review; 4. Member Communication Strategy; 5. Legal Challenges Update
resolutions: FY2024 fund growth of KES 29.5 billion noted. NSSF Act 2023 implementation plan endorsed. Investment portfolio rebalancing approved. Member communication campaign budget approved.
